risk_title: Flood-Related Infrastructure Damage Affecting Service Delivery
risk_summary: Health facilities in Sindh were damaged during the 2022 floods, requiring civil works reconstruction. This infrastructure damage is directly impacting the project's ability to deliver RMNCAH+N services and implement planned interventions, particularly for GBV clinical management services.
evidence_quote: It is essential to maintain and accelerate implementation including completing the civil works related to the health facilities that were damaged during the 2022 floods.

risk_title: Delayed Implementation of GBV Services Due to Infrastructure Reconstruction
risk_summary: GBV survivor clinical management services at health facilities cannot be implemented until facility reconstructions from the 2022 floods are completed, creating a gap in critical health services for vulnerable populations affected by conflict-related violence.
evidence_quote: Currently, this is not done at the GD level. This will be done through this project after the reconstructions are completed.
